mapper.update: UPDATE user_follow SET status = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId} AND status = 0
UPDATE user_follow SET status = 0, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE following_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{userId} AND status = 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS nickname, u.avatar, ui.signature FROM user_follow f INNER JOIN user_account u ON u.id = f.follower_id LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON ui.user_id = u.id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.id, u.username, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS nickname, u.avatar, ui.signature FROM user_follow f INNER JOIN user_account u ON u.id = f.following_id LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON ui.user_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
